settings.title: Settings | EducarIA
settings.hero.title: Account settings
settings.hero.copy: Update your main details, keep your school information current, and change your password when needed.
settings.profile.label: Profile
settings.language.label: Language
settings.profile.edit.label: Personal details
settings.profile.edit.title: Edit profile
settings.profile.edit.copy: These details appear on the dashboard and help personalize your experience.
settings.fields.name: Name
settings.security.label: Security
settings.security.title: Change password
settings.security.copy: For your security, confirm your current password before setting a new one.
settings.plan.label: Plan
settings.plan.title: Initial billing
settings.plan.copy: While we validate the paid plan, you can register interest in Pro and prioritize your account for the next stage.
settings.plan.note: What do you expect from Pro?
settings.plan.note.placeholder: E.g. more AI generations, expanded library, reports, or resources for my routine.
settings.pilot.label: Pilot program
settings.pilot.title: Track usage
settings.pilot.copy: Use this block to identify the pilot account and export basic usage events while we validate retention.
library.title: Library | EducarIA
library.sidebar.subject: Subject
library.materials.label: Materials
library.materials.copy: Open, edit, or present any saved material, regardless of class.
library.filters.sort.title: Title A-Z
library.empty.label: Empty library
library.empty.title: No material saved in the library yet
library.empty.copy: Use Save to library in any activity to build your reusable collection.
library.empty.searchCopy: Review the search or clear filters to see more materials.
library.empty.noFilterCopy: Change the filter to view other formats saved in the library.
dashboard.title: Teacher Dashboard | EducarIA
dashboard.sidebar.subject: Subject
dashboard.hero.copy: Ready to transform today's lesson? Create materials faster and keep everything organized with context.
dashboard.quick.title: Create an activity in a few clicks
dashboard.quick.copy: Choose the class, use a core format, and go straight into the editor. Quick suggestion: Slides (10-15 min), Quiz (5-8 min), Full lesson (15-25 min).
dashboard.toolkit.label: Core flow
dashboard.toolkit.title: Start here
dashboard.toolkit.slides.copy: Use for: leading instruction and organizing the lesson sequence. Estimated time: 10 to 15 min.
dashboard.toolkit.quiz.copy: Use for: reviewing content at the end of class and checking understanding. Estimated time: 5 to 8 min.
dashboard.toolkit.lesson.copy: Use for: planning a full block with opening, development, and closing. Estimated time: 15 to 25 min.
dashboard.toolkit.moreFormats.copy: Use extra formats for specific lesson moments: short review, quick activity, or light closure.
dashboard.classes.label: My ecosystem
dashboard.classes.title: Active classes
dashboard.empty.noClassesCopy: Use the Create class button in the sidebar to get started.
dashboard.classCard.copy: Open the class to create new activities or resume saved materials.
dashboard.library.label: Your collection
dashboard.library.title: Review your saved materials
dashboard.library.copy: The library gathers the activities and lessons you saved so you can reuse, edit, and organize them by class.
classes.title: Classes | EducarIA
classes.hero.label: Teacher classes
classes.hero.title: Cards by class
classes.hero.copy: Use "View materials" to open the class collection or "Create material" to go straight to the tool panel with the class already selected.
classes.summary.label: Summary
classes.summary.title: Class overview
classes.summary.copy: Each card below shows the volume of materials already created and offers the most useful next step for the class.
classes.empty.noClassesCopy: Use the Create class button in the sidebar to get started and organize activities by class.
classes.empty.noFilterTitle: No class found in this filter
classes.empty.noFilterCopy: Change the filter to view other classes in the panel.
classes.latest.label: Recent activity
classDetail.title: Class | EducarIA
classDetail.flow.label: Core flow
classDetail.flow.title: Prepare this class's next lesson
classDetail.flow.copy: Recommended flow: Slides (10-15 min) to guide instruction, Quiz (5-8 min) to review, and Library to reuse materials.
classDetail.activities.label: Class activities
classDetail.activities.copy: Only materials from the selected class appear here, grouped by format to make resuming, editing, and presenting easier.
classDetail.flow.noClassesSummary: Create the first class to start the core flow: Slides (10-15 min), Quiz (5-8 min), and Library for reuse.
classDetail.flow.noMaterialsSummary: does not have saved materials yet. Suggestion: start with Slides (10-15 min), close with Quiz (5-8 min), and save to the Library.
classDetail.empty.selectClassTitle: Create or select a class to continue
classDetail.empty.selectClassCopy: After that, this class's most recent activities appear here with quick actions.
classDetail.empty.classWithoutActivity: does not have a saved activity yet
classDetail.empty.startWithSlides: Start with Slides to guide the lesson and finish with Quiz to review in a few minutes.
classDetail.empty.createFirstClassTitle: Create the first class to get started
classDetail.empty.createFirstClassCopy: After creating the class, saved activities will appear organized here.
classDetail.empty.noClassesCardCopy: Use the Create class button in the sidebar to build the first class and start saving activities.
classDetail.empty.noReadyActivityCopy: Save a finished activity so it appears here and can be reopened later.
classDetail.empty.noSavedInClass: No saved activity in this class
classDetail.empty.noFilterActivityCopy: Change the filter to see other formats saved in this class.
auth.login.title: Sign in | EducarIA
auth.register.title: Create Account | EducarIA
auth.login.label: Sign in
auth.login.heading: Access your account
auth.login.copy: Use your email and password to open your account and continue working on the platform.
auth.login.noAccountCopy: Create your account with name, email, and school institution to get started.
auth.register.label: Registration
auth.register.heading: Create account
auth.register.copy: Fill in the teacher details and create a password to enter the platform and start building classes.
auth.fields.name: Name
auth.fields.newPassword.placeholder: Create a password with at least 6 characters
auth.register.hasAccountCopy: Sign in with the registered email to open your platform.
auth.feedback.unavailable: Authentication is temporarily unavailable. Try again in a moment.
auth.feedback.connectUnavailable: Could not connect to the authentication service. Try again in a moment.
auth.feedback.enterEmail: Enter your email to sign in.
auth.feedback.registerRequired: Fill in name, email, and password to create your account.
auth.feedback.passwordLength: The password must have at least 6 characters.
auth.feedback.passwordMismatch: Passwords do not match. Check and try again.
auth.errors.emailInUse: An account already exists with this email.
auth.errors.weakPassword: The password needs to be stronger.
auth.errors.userNotFound: No account found with this email.
auth.errors.generic: Could not complete authentication right now.
